rulings.Case Title: EUGENE STRAND et al VS. ASBESTOS CORPORATION LIMITED et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or Alternatively Summary Adjudication
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, March 4, 2015 in Department 503, Line 1. Defendant Applied Materials, Inc.'s motion for summary judgment or, alternatively, summary adjudication is off calendar at the moving party's request. = (503/TLJ)
